rows: EV charging infrastructure (minimum level of provision)1

Level 1 – one bay per powered site
Level 1 – 50% of communal bays
Level 2 – 2% of bays with a minimum of one bay
Level 2 – 2% of bays with a minimum of one bay
Level 2 – 2% of bays with a minimum of one bay

Level 1 – to each bay assigned for hotel guest use; and
Level 2 – 2% of bays where communal parking (including associated bar/
restaurant/hospitality areas) is available with a minimum of one bay
EV charging infrastructure (minimum level of provision)1

Level 1 – to each bay assigned for motel guest use; and
Level 2 – 2% of bays where communal parking (including associated bar/
restaurant/hospitality areas) is available with a minimum of one bay
Level 2 – 2% of bays with a minimum of one bay

Level 2 – one bay per 10,000m2, with a minimum of 2 bays
i.e 5,001-10,000m2 = 2 EV bays
10,001-20,000m2 = 2 EV bays
20,001-30,000m2 = 3 EV bays...
...100,001-110,000m2 = 11 EV bays
Level 1 – to 50% of bays assigned for guest use
Level 1 – to each parking bay assigned to a dwelling
